questionHtml:
Taxol is a chiral cancer drug which is synthesized using a chiral auxiliary.

The diagram shows part of a Taxol molecule in skeletal form.

Draw a circle around each chiral carbon.
markschemeHtml: Do not penalize any other notation (eg *) used for a circle.

meta.title: The diagram shows part of a Taxol molecule in skeletal form. Draw a circle around each chiral carbon.
breadcrumbLabels: D.7 Taxol—a chiral auxiliary case study (HL only)
